---
title: "Figure 3 – Cell type specific nigral changes"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(png)
library(grid)

pA <- ggplot(prop_df,
             aes(celltype, proportion, fill=disease)) +
      geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") +
      ggtitle("A")
pA

# Replace path with real image
imgB <- rasterGrob(readPNG("figures/raw_images/AGTR1_puncta.png"))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(imgB)

pC <- ggplot(coverage_df,
             aes(group, value)) +
      geom_boxplot() +
      ggtitle("C")
pC

imgD <- rasterGrob(readPNG("figures/raw_images/ODC_perineuronal.png"))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(imgD)

pE <- ggplot(deg_summary,
             aes(celltype, n_degs, fill=condition)) +
      geom_bar(stat="identity") +
      ggtitle("E")
pE


pF <- ggplot(pseudotime_df,
             aes(pseudotime, color=disease)) +
      geom_density() +
      ggtitle("F")
pF

pG <- ggplot(risk_df,
             aes(interval, expression)) +
      geom_violin() +
      ggtitle("G")
pG
